---
title: "Cluster analysis"
description: |
  A theoretical and practical guide for K-Mean clustering and Latent Profile Analysis in R
author:
  - name: Joachim Waterschoot
date: 06-09-2021
categories:
  - portfolios
  - dygraphs
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    toc_float: true
    highlight: haddock
    highlight_downlit: true
---

```{r, layout="l-body-outset", preview=TRUE}
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(diamonds, aes(carat, price)) + geom_smooth() +
  facet_grid(~ cut)
```

<aside>
Here is a small side note.
</aside>
